blog_title: Top 5 Activities in Dubai For Honeymooners
seo_title: Top 5 Activities in Dubai For Honeymooners
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by Travelxploria on Sat Jun 14 2025

Hey there, lovebirds! First of all, congratulations on your marriage or in advance if you are planning to. If you are looking for the perfect honeymoon destination that offers luxury, adventure, and romance all in one? That will make your love life memorable, then Dubai is the perfect place for you. Here will discuss the Top 5 Activities in Dubai For Honeymooners. Also, you can check out some affordable Dubai tour packages from the best international tour operator in Kolkata. Just give us a call.

This incredible city in the United Arab Emirates has become a hot spot for honeymooners for many good reasons. Let me explain why you should consider Dubai as your honeymoon destination.

5 Activities in Dubai For Honeymooners

Dubai is a wonderful place for couples to visit because it offers a unique blend of modernity and tradition, with stunning architecture, pristine beaches, and thrilling activities. Plus, the hospitality and service in Dubai are second to none, making it an ideal location for a romantic getaway.
In this post, we’ll be sharing Activities in Dubai For Honeymooners, especially for you. From relaxing on the beach to exploring the desert, and also the perfect times for those activities, and expenses, don’t worry at all cause we’ve got you covered. Here’s a quick overview of what we’ll be discussing:


• Relax on Jumeirah Beach
• Enjoy a Romantic Dinner Cruise
• Explore the Dubai Miracle Garden
• Visit the Burj Khalifa and Watch the Dubai Fountain Show
• Take a Desert Safari and Camp under the Stars

So, grab your significant other, get ready for an unforgettable adventure, and let’s dive into the top five activities for honeymooners in Dubai!

Relax on Jumeirah Beach

Picture this: soft white sand, crystal-clear water, and palm trees swaying in the gentle breeze.
This is Jumeirah Beach, one of the most beautiful and luxurious beaches in Dubai.
Here are some reasons why honeymooners should definitely make time to relax on Jumeirah Beach:

Overview

Beauty and Luxury: Jumeirah Beach is a stunningly beautiful and well-maintained beach, with a long stretch of white sand that’s perfect for long walks or sunbathing. It also offers a range of luxurious amenities and facilities, including beach clubs, lounges, and restaurants.

Amenities and Activities: There’s no shortage of things to do on Jumeirah Beach. You can rent a private cabana, enjoy a massage on the beach, or go parasailing or jet skiing. There are also plenty of dining options, from casual beachside cafes to upscale restaurants.

A Great Place to Unwind: After the stress of wedding planning and the hustle and bustle of the city, Jumeirah Beach offers a serene and peaceful environment for honeymooners to unwind and spend quality time together. Whether you want to relax with a good book or take a dip in the water, this beach has something for everyone.

Activities & Costs –

The expenses of enjoying the beauty and luxury of Jumeirah Beach in Dubai can vary depending on the activities and amenities you choose. Here are some general expenses you can expect:

• Access to the beach is free of charge.
• Renting a sun lounger or umbrella can cost around 50-100 AED ($14-27 USD) per day.
• Private cabanas with additional amenities like Wi-Fi, TVs, and butler service can cost several hundred AED per day.
• Water sports such as parasailing or jet skiing can range from 150-500 AED ($41-136 USD) depending on the activity and duration.
• Beach clubs and lounges can range from moderate to high-end, with prices for food and drinks varying accordingly. A typical meal for two people at a beachside restaurant can cost around 200-500 AED ($54-136 USD) or more, depending on the restaurant and menu.

Must Try Food & Drinks on Jumeirah Beach

Jumeirah Beach in Dubai is home to a variety of dining options that range from casual beachside cafes to upscale restaurants. The food and drink costs can vary depending on the restaurant and menu, but here are some examples to give you an idea:
If you’re visiting Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, there are some must-try food and drinks that you shouldn’t miss. Here are a few recommendations:

Fresh Seafood: As a coastal destination, Jumeirah Beach is known for its fresh seafood. There are many beachside restaurants that serve a variety of seafood dishes, including grilled fish, prawns, and calamari. The cost of seafood dishes can vary depending on the type of fish and the restaurant, but you can expect to pay around 100-200 AED ($27-54 USD) per dish.

Arabic Mezze: Mezze is a traditional Middle Eastern appetizer that typically consists of small plates of dips, salads, and bread. Many beachside restaurants in Jumeirah serve Arabic mezze, which is a great way to sample a variety of local flavors. The cost of mezze can vary depending on the number of plates you order, but you can expect to pay around 50-100 AED ($14-27 USD) per person.

Fresh Juice: With the warm weather in Dubai, staying hydrated is important. There are many beachside juice bars that serve fresh juices made from local fruits like mango, watermelon, and pomegranate. The cost of fresh juice can range from 20-40 AED ($5-11 USD) per drink.

Cocktails: Jumeirah Beach is also home to many beachside bars that serve a variety of cocktails. Some popular cocktails include mojitos, margaritas, and piña coladas. The cost of cocktails can vary depending on the bar and the type of drink, but you can expect to pay around 50-100 AED ($14-27 USD) per drink.

Overall, there are many delicious food and drink options to try at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. Just make sure to budget accordingly and try a variety of local flavors to get the full experience.

Best Time To Visit

The best time of day to visit Jumeirah Beach in Dubai can depend on a few factors, such as the weather, crowd levels, and your personal preferences. Here are a few things to consider:

Weather: Dubai can get very hot during the day, especially during the summer months. If you’re sensitive to heat, you may prefer to visit the beach early in the morning or in the late afternoon/evening when it’s cooler.

Crowds: Jumeirah Beach can get crowded, especially during peak tourist season. If you prefer a quieter experience, you may want to visit the beach early in the morning or on weekdays.

Activities: Some activities, such as water sports or beachside dining, may be more enjoyable during certain times of the day. For example, water sports may be better in the morning when the water is calmer, while beachside dining may be more romantic in the evening when the sun sets over the sea.

Important things to note

Respect local customs: Dubai is a Muslim country, and it’s important to respect local customs and dress modestly. Bikinis and swimwear are acceptable on the beach, but it’s recommended to wear a cover-up when walking around or leaving the beach area.

Follow beach safety rules: The beach can have strong currents and waves, so it’s important to follow beach safety rules and only swim in designated areas. It’s also a good idea to keep an eye on children and inexperienced swimmers.

Avoid swimming during jellyfish season: During the summer months, jellyfish can be present in the water. If you notice signs warning of jellyfish or see jellyfish in the water, it’s best to avoid swimming.

Be cautious of vendors: There may be vendors selling items on the beach, but it’s important to be cautious of scams or overpriced items. If you’re not interested in purchasing anything, politely decline and continue enjoying your time on the beach.

So, if you’re looking for a romantic and relaxing way to spend your honeymoon in Dubai, make sure to put Jumeirah Beach on your itinerary. It’s the perfect place to soak up the sun, enjoy the beautiful views, and create unforgettable memories with your partner. that’s why it’s on our list of Activities in Dubai For Honeymooners.

Enjoy a Romantic Dinner Cruise

Dubai is known for its luxurious experiences, and a dinner cruise is no exception. With many different options available, honeymooners are sure to find a dinner cruise that suits their taste and budget.

Overview

One popular option is the Bateaux Dubai dinner cruise, which takes guests on a two-and-a-half-hour journey along Dubai Creek. The boat features a glass-enclosed dining area, providing stunning views of the city skyline at night. The menu includes a four-course gourmet meal and a selection of beverages.

For those looking for a more traditional experience, the Dhow Cruise Dubai offers a dinner cruise on a wooden Dhow boat. The boat is decorated with traditional Arabic decor and sails along the Dubai Creek or Dubai Marina. Guests can enjoy a buffet dinner with a range of international and local dishes, as well as traditional entertainment such as music and dance performances.

For a more intimate experience, Xclusive Yachts offers private yacht charters for dinner cruises. Couples can choose from a range of luxury yachts and create a customized dining experience, including a personalized menu and decor.

The benefits of taking a dinner cruise in Dubai are many. Not only do you get to see the city from a unique perspective, but you can also enjoy a romantic dinner with a view. The soft glow of the city lights combined with the gentle motion of the boat creates a truly magical atmosphere that’s perfect for honeymooners.

Costs Of A Romantic Dinner Cruise & Entertainment


The cost of a dinner cruise in Dubai varies depending on the cruise operator, the type of boat, and the inclusions of the package. Here are some general guidelines to help give you an idea of the costs involved:

Bateaux Dubai: The cost per person for the dinner cruise starts at around AED 350 ($95 USD) and goes up to AED 795 ($216 USD) for a window table and additional inclusions.

Dhow Cruise Dubai: The cost per person for the dinner cruise starts at around AED 150 ($40 USD) and goes up to AED 250 ($68 USD) for a VIP upper deck package.

Xclusive Yachts: The cost for a private yacht charter for a dinner cruise starts at around AED 2,000 ($545 USD) for a two-hour cruise and goes up to AED 11,000 ($3,000 USD) for a six-hour cruise on a luxury yacht.

It’s worth noting that these prices may fluctuate depending on the time of year, demand, and availability. It’s always a good idea to check with the cruise operator for the most up-to-date pricing and to inquire about any current promotions or discounts.

While dinner cruises in Dubai can be a splurge, they are often all-inclusive, meaning that the price includes food and drinks, as well as entertainment and a unique experience. It’s important to factor in the overall value of the package when considering the cost.

In summary, a dinner cruise is a must-try experience for honeymooners visiting Dubai. With different options available to suit every taste and budget, it’s sure to be a highlight of your trip.

Explore the Dubai Miracle Garden

Overview

Dubai Miracle Garden is a stunning oasis of floral beauty located in the heart of Dubai. It is the world’s largest flower garden, covering an area of over 72,000 square meters. The garden is home to over 45 million flowers arranged in different shapes and sizes, including hearts, stars, and pyramids. Here are some reasons why the Dubai Miracle Garden is a must-visit destination for honeymooners:

The beauty of the Garden: The Dubai Miracle Garden is a beautiful and colorful paradise that features a vast collection of flowers and plants arranged in various shapes and designs. It’s a fantastic spot to take romantic strolls and enjoy the natural beauty of the garden.

Attractions within the Garden: The Dubai Miracle Garden has many attractions within the garden that make it a fascinating place to explore. Some of the attractions include the heart-shaped pathway, the floral clock, the butterfly garden, and the aromatic garden. There’s also a dedicated area for children called “Disney Avenue” that features Disney-themed topiaries.

Ideal for Memorable Pictures: The Dubai Miracle Garden is a perfect place for honeymooners to take memorable pictures. The beautiful floral arrangements and the breathtaking landscape make for stunning backdrops that will add color and vibrancy to your pictures.

Relaxing Environment: The garden is an excellent place to unwind and relax after the hustle and bustle of the city. With its serene environment and refreshing scent of flowers, the Dubai Miracle Garden is an ideal place to spend quality time with your partner.

Costs

The cost of visiting the Dubai Miracle Garden depends on several factors such as age, nationality, and time of the visit. Here’s a breakdown of the costs involved:

Admission Fees: The admission fees to the Dubai Miracle Garden are AED 55 per person for adults and AED 40 per person for children aged between 3 to 12 years. Children under three years of age can enter the garden free of charge.

Other Expenses: Apart from admission fees, there may be additional expenses such as parking fees, food, and souvenir purchases.

Discounts: Dubai Miracle Garden offers discounts for groups of 20 or more people. Additionally, UAE residents can avail themselves of discounted admission fees by presenting their Emirates ID at the gate.


Timings: The garden is open from 9:00 am to 9:00 pm on weekdays, and from 9:00 am to 11:00 pm on weekends (Friday and Saturday). Visitors can choose to visit the garden during the daytime or at night when the garden is beautifully lit up.

Overall, the costs of visiting the Dubai Miracle Garden are reasonable, and visitors can expect to have a memorable experience at the world’s largest flower garden. It’s an excellent choice for honeymooners who want to take a break from the city’s hustle and bustle and enjoy the natural beauty of Dubai.

 

Best time of day to visit

 

The best time of day to visit the Dubai Miracle Garden is in the early morning or late afternoon when the temperature is cooler and the sunlight is not as harsh. This will make it more comfortable to walk around the garden and enjoy the beautiful blooms without feeling overheated. 

Additionally, visiting during these times will provide visitors with a chance to see the garden in a different light – the morning sun will illuminate the flowers in a unique way, while the late afternoon sun will cast a warm, golden glow over the entire garden.

Overall, the Dubai Miracle Garden is a perfect destination for honeymooners who love nature and want to enjoy the natural beauty of Dubai. It’s a unique and beautiful spot that will create unforgettable memories for you and your partner.

 

Visit the Burj Khalifa and Watch the Dubai Fountain Show

 

Overview

 

The Burj Khalifa is one of the most iconic landmarks in Dubai and the tallest building in the world. Honeymooners can visit the observation deck on the 124th floor and take in the breathtaking panoramic views of the city. In addition to this, the Dubai Fountain Show is another must-see attraction in Dubai, featuring a spectacular display of water, music, and lights.

Watching the Dubai Fountain Show from the observation deck of the Burj Khalifa is an unforgettable experience for honeymooners. The show is particularly stunning at night when the colorful lights and water jets dance in perfect synchronization. The view of the city skyline from the observation deck during the show is also a sight to behold.

To make the most of this experience, it is recommended that honeymooners book their tickets in advance and time their visit to coincide with sunset. This way, they can see the city both in daylight and at night when it is lit up by a million lights.

 

Costs

 

The cost of visiting the Burj Khalifa and watching the Dubai Fountain Show varies depending on the package and time of day. Here are some estimated costs:

At the Top, Burj Khalifa: This package includes a visit to the observation deck on the 124th floor of the Burj Khalifa. Prices range from AED 149 to AED 378 per person, depending on the time of day and whether you book in advance.

At the Top, Burj Khalifa SKY: This package includes a visit to the highest observation deck in the world on the 148th floor of the Burj Khalifa. Prices start at AED 379 per person.

Dubai Fountain Show: Watching the fountain show is free of charge.

Dining options: There are several dining options available at the Burj Khalifa, including At.Mosphere is the highest restaurant in the world. Prices for a meal at At.Mosphere start at AED 625 per person.

In conclusion, visiting the Burj Khalifa and watching the Dubai Fountain Show is an activity that honeymooners should not miss out on. It is a great way to experience the grandeur of Dubai and create unforgettable memories.

 

Take a Desert Safari and Camp under the Stars

 

Overview

 

Taking a desert safari and camping under the stars is a must-do activity for honeymooners visiting Dubai. Here are some things to know:

Desert Safari Options: There are different types of desert safaris available in Dubai, such as dune bashing, sandboarding, and camel rides. You can also opt for a luxury desert safari that includes a private camp, gourmet dinner, and entertainment.

Camping under the stars: Spending a night under the stars in the desert is a unique and romantic experience. You can enjoy a traditional Bedouin-style dinner, listen to live music and stargaze.

Best desert safari and camping experiences: Some of the best desert safari and camping experiences for honeymooners include Arabian Adventures, Platinum Heritage, and Desert Rangers.

It’s important to note that temperatures can drop significantly at night in the desert, so it’s recommended to bring warm clothing and blankets. Also, be sure to book your desert safari and camping experience with a reputable company to ensure your safety and comfort.

 

Costs

 

The costs of taking a desert safari and camping under the stars in Dubai can vary depending on the type of experience you choose. Here are some general price ranges:

Basic desert safari: Prices can range from AED 150 to AED 300 per person, depending on the duration of the safari and the activities included.

Luxury desert safari: Prices can range from AED 500 to AED 1,000 per person, depending on the level of luxury and exclusivity.

Camping under the stars: Prices can range from AED 500 to AED 1,000 per person, depending on the type of accommodation, amenities, and activities included.

It’s important to note that these are general price ranges and the actual costs may vary based on the tour operator and the time of year. Be sure to book with a reputable company and confirm all costs before making a reservation.

 

Dubai is an ideal honeymoon destination for couples because of its unique blend of modern luxury and traditional charm. From relaxing on beautiful beaches to exploring stunning gardens and experiencing the thrill of desert safaris, there is something for everyone in Dubai. Couples can create unforgettable memories while enjoying the city’s world-class dining, shopping, and entertainment options.
